text: Bleeding - attacks with a blood beam attack on enemies.
Vampirism - takes 15% of the enemy's health with the help of a blood beam.
Transfusion - Transfers 15% of the player's health to another entity.
Blood Corruption: +20% damage; 10% chance to apply "Wither II" for 5 sec.
Bloodthirst: On kill, 50% chance to restore 10% max health.
